versions.version_description: First of all I made some editions to the text structure to improve the overview. I changed the chord postitions and the chords themselfes.
If anyone wants to improve this submission, I'd be really greatful :) Thank you.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Adam Lambert: Whataya Want From Me

Here is the YouTube vid that I transcribed this tab from.....

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UNOUi4JW_1w

[tab]Chords Used
   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]C9[/ch]?   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]

B|-1----3---1---1-----1---1------|
G|-2----0---0---0-----2---2------|
D|-2----0---2---0-----3---3------|
A|-0----2---3---3-----3---3------|
E|------3-------------1----------|[/tab]

[tab]INTRO
    Hey     Slow    Down      What-A--Ya   Want  From  Me
e|--9-------9-xx----8---------13--13--13---13----5-----5------|
B|--11------11xx----9---------14--14--14---14----6-----6------|
G|--10------10xx----10--------13--13--13---13----5-----5------|
D|------------------------------------------------------------|
A|------------------------------------------------------------|
E|------------------------------------------------------------|[/tab]

[tab]VERSE - I've shown the way you alternate between the "C" chords once below.
  Hey, slow it down whataya want from me?

There might have been a time   And I would give myself away [/tab]

Whataya want from me [/tab]
